description_long: This is a pair of high-top athletic sneakers, predominantly black and white in color, with a classic basketball-inspired silhouette. The shoes feature a smooth leather upper with black overlays on the toe, eyelets, and heel, contrasted by white panels on the sides and around the ankle collar. A prominent black Nike Swoosh logo is visible on the side, and a white winged basketball emblem is stamped near the ankle. The shoes have a white midsole and a black outsole, with black laces threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern through multiple eyelets. The tongue displays a small logo patch, and the overall construction appears sturdy and well-cushioned, suitable for urban and athletic use.
description: A pair of high-top black and white leather sneakers with a Nike Swoosh and winged logo, featuring black laces and a sturdy, cushioned build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toe box perforations, black laces, and tongue logo patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black Nike Swoosh, white winged logo, and layered leather panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded ankle collars and heel construction.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the Swoosh and winged logo.
attribute_logo: White winged basketball logo on the ankle, white Nike Swoosh on the side, small logo patch on the tongue
